queries.question: What building and room number is Human Biology studied in?
queries.sql: SELECT Building, RoomNumber FROM Courses WHERE CourseTitle = 'Human Biology'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?building ?roomnumber WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:Building ?building .
  ?courses p:RoomNumber ?roomnumber .
  ?courses p:CourseTitle ?coursetitle_f .
  FILTER(STR(?coursetitle_f) = STR("Human Biology"))
}

queries.question: Show all courses and the buildings and room numbers where they take place.
queries.sql: SELECT CourseTitle , Building, RoomNumber FROM Courses
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?coursetitle ?building ?roomnumber WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:CourseTitle ?coursetitle .
  ?courses p:Building ?building .
  ?courses p:RoomNumber ?roomnumber .
}
